user.title: RTS Smart Covers
user.description: Create a smart timed cover for an RTS/RFXtrx cover.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure RTS Smart Cover
reconfigure.description: Update the smart cover name, travel time or initial assumed position. The source cover cannot be changed here; remove this entry and create a new one if you need another source cover.

abort.already_configured: This source cover is already configured.
